title: Implement smart API matching algorithm for multi-repo workspaces
description: Algorithm to link frontend API calls to backend endpoints across multiple repos. Match by: path patterns, HTTP methods, request/response shapes. Store mappings in analysis results. Handle microservices architectures with API gateway patterns.

title: Add logo SVG to application
description: Generate and add simple SVG logo. Previously mentioned but not yet added.

title: Implement GET /api/plugin/workspaces endpoint
description: Create src/app/api/plugin/workspaces/route.ts. Fetch user workspaces with domain mappings, enrich with analysis details (branch, commit, repo). Support POST for creating workspaces.

title: Add Northwestern messaging to landing page and auth pages
Implement proactive feedback prompt after first analysis completion

description: Create src/app/api/plugin/chat/route.ts. Extend chat service to accept element context. Enable contextual questions about specific UI elements for Chrome plugin.

title: Create elements database table
description: Create migration 006 for elements table. Store UI element details (selector, handlers, API calls, state updates). Add Element types and repository layer for element-level analysis data.

title: Add Supabase schema migrations (admin_config, waitlist_requests, feedback_submissions)

description: New endpoint for Chrome plugin to retrieve user's workspace profiles (manual mappings of domains to analysis IDs). Schema: workspaces table with user_id, name, domain_mappings (JSONB), repo_urls[], created_at. Include RLS policies.

title: Create floating feedback widget component with slide-out panel

description: Improve landing page for users, investors, entrepreneurship community. Showcase Chrome plugin feature (inspect-like tool showing data sources, DBs, APIs, controllers). Make it professional and comprehensive.

title: Implement Step 1: Project Details form
Enhance analysis to extract element-level data (selectors, component hierarchy)
Header buttons don't update after login
description: Post-login, header buttons (login, signup) do not update automatically leaving user confused about login status. Needs automatic update.

title: Add GitHub issue creation button in Issues tab (LOW PRIORITY)

description: Add email verification flow using OTP sent to user's email during signup.

title: Implement GET /api/plugin/analysis/:id/element endpoint
description: Create src/app/api/plugin/analysis/[id]/element/route.ts. Return element-specific data with data flow (UI → API → Database). Query by selector or component name.

title: Add GitHub logo and platform messaging to wizard Step 2
Design enhanced analysis schema for element-level granularity
description: Current analysis is component-level. Chrome plugin needs element-level data (buttons, inputs, divs with click handlers). Design schema extensions to capture: element selectors, event handlers, data attributes, parent-child relationships, API call origins at element level.

title: Implement Step 3: Requirements with README import and doc upload
Design database schema for workspace profiles and domain mappings
Create feedback API endpoint (POST /api/feedback) with Resend notifications
Add AST parsing for element-level code extraction
description: Current analyzer uses Claude AI for high-level analysis. Add AST parsing (using @babel/parser or typescript compiler API) to extract precise element-level data: JSX element trees, onClick handlers, event listeners, data attributes, conditional rendering.

title: Create waitlist API endpoint (POST /api/waitlist) with Resend notifications
Create WizardStepper component with 3-step navigation
Add README import API endpoint
Audit current analysis results to identify available data granularity

description: Feedback dropdown is not customized to theme. White text appears on white background making it unreadable.

title: Integrate Resend for email notifications (waitlist, feedback)
Chrome Plugin Backend Support - Epic
description: Build backend APIs and infrastructure to support Chrome plugin development. Chrome plugin will be built by colleague - we need to ensure all necessary endpoints, data structures, and documentation are ready.

title: Generate API docs for Chrome plugin + analyze architecture needs
description: Create API documentation for another Claude agent working on Chrome plugin. Analyze what else is needed: new APIs? Architecture changes? Analysis module revamp? Findings will inform landing page.

title: Auto-run analysis when adding new repo
description: Analysis is not automatically done when adding new repo. User has to click 'Run Analysis' again. Might be just a UI issue - if analysis is ongoing it should show correctly.

title: Remove Northwestern mentions from login/signup flow
description: Don't mention NW community at all in login screen. Show waitlist message AFTER signup if non-NW email. Waitlist popup breaks flow when typing email - remove immediate popup.

title: Add git metadata to analysis results
description: Track branch, commit, commit_url in analysis_results table. Create migration 004, update TypeScript types, extract git info from repos, pass to analysis creation. Enables Chrome plugin to show 'Analysis: main@abc123'

title: Implement GET /api/plugin/analysis/:id/element endpoint
description: Element-specific analysis endpoint. Given element selector + page URL, return: component location, event handlers, API calls triggered, state updates, data flow layers (UI→API→Controller→DB). Query against enhanced analysis schema.

title: Implement inline waitlist form on signup page with email domain detection
Update analysis results schema with element-level data
description: Extend analysis_results table or create new tables for element-level data. Consider: elements table (id, analysis_id, selector, component_path, handler_code), api_mappings table (id, frontend_call, backend_endpoint, method, repos). Update repository layer.

title: Create wizard state management and navigation logic
Create API documentation for Chrome extension developer
description: Write comprehensive API docs at docs/api/chrome-plugin-api.md. Document authentication, all endpoints, error handling, testing, CORS config. Ready for handoff to colleague building Chrome extension.

title: Analyze current API capabilities vs Chrome plugin requirements
description: Deep dive into existing APIs, compare with Chrome plugin design doc requirements. Identify gaps in: element-level data granularity, workspace management, multi-repo support, smart API matching, and chat context handling. Document findings in analysis-audit-findings.md

title: Implement POST /api/plugin/chat endpoint with element context
description: Hybrid chat endpoint that accepts: element context (selector, page, component), codebase-wide context (project ID), and session history. Routes to Claude AI with appropriate context windowing. Return streamed responses with code references.

title: Create comprehensive API documentation for Chrome extension developer
description: Generate detailed API docs covering: authentication (JWT tokens, how to pass from extension), all plugin endpoints (request/response schemas, examples), error handling, rate limits, CORS configuration. Include Postman collection or OpenAPI spec. Target audience: colleague building Chrome extension.
